call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that fit within your budget? 
Eleanor: Hmm, maybe. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed, right? 
Agent: Absolutely fixed for the life of the loan. So, you'll know exactly what your payments are each month. 
Eleanor: Alright, that sounds good. Let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! I just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller, this is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: (Sighs) Look, you guys called me yesterday. Where did you even get my number? 
Agent: Sir, we acquired your information through… uh… a marketing partner. We're offering a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's highway robbery! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: I don't need rewards points! I need a reasonable interest rate. This is ridiculous. I'm not interested. Don't call me again. 
Agent: Sir, please… 
Robert: (Hangs up)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. Your friend, Michael, referred you to us. He mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Michael did mention something. I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: That's fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. The terms are very flexible. 
Jessica: 7.49%? That's pretty good. What's the monthly payment? 
Agent: Approximately $290 for 60 months. We also offer options for 36 or 48 months if you'd like to pay it off faster. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $300 origination fee, but we can sometimes waive that for preferred customers. Let me check… Yes, I can waive the origination fee for you. 
Jessica: Really? That's great! 
Agent: Absolutely. So, we're looking at $290 a month, no origination fee, and a fixed rate of 7.49%. Does that sound good? 
Jessica: Yeah, that sounds really good. Let's go ahead and do it. 
Agent: Wonderful! I just need to confirm a few details…

Agent: Hello David, this is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
David: Oh, right. I was just checking out the rewards program. 
Agent: Excellent! We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 16.99%. It offers 2% cashback on all purchases. 
David: 16.99% is a little high, isn't it? I was hoping for something lower. 
Agent: Well, sir, that rate is based on your credit score. However, we do offer a balance transfer option if you have higher-interest debt elsewhere. 
David: I do, actually. But I'm not sure I want to commit to another credit card right now. I'm trying to simplify things. 
Agent: I understand. Perhaps you'd like me to send you some more information about the card and its benefits? 
David: Yeah, that would be great. Send me an email. 
Agent: Absolutely. What's your email address? … Okay, perfect. You'll receive the information shortly. Thank you for your time, David.

Agent: Hello Mrs. Rodriguez, this is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special personal loan… 
Maria: (Interrupting) Where did you get my number? I didn't ask for this. 
Agent: Ma'am, we are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%… 
Maria: 24.99?! That's outrageous! I'm not interested. Don't call me again! (Hangs up)
